headline: Micron’s AI-Fueled Q2 Surge And Record Capex Plan Could Be A Game Changer For Micron Technology (MU)
summary: In March 2026, Micron Technology reported fiscal second-quarter results showing revenue of US$23.86 billion and net income of US$13.79 billion, issued third-quarter guidance for revenue of US$33.5 billion ± US$0.75 billion and diluted EPS of US$18.90 ± US$0.40, and raised its quarterly dividend to US$0.15 per share. The company’s results and guidance highlight how AI-driven demand, tight memory supply, and heavy capital spending are reshaping Micron’s margins, cash generation, and long-term...
